job_title: Software Engineer 3, Atlas Data Federation Customer Experience
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Go, Java, React, Distributed storage systems, Cloud-native backend systems
skill_match_scores: Go:1.0, Java:1.0, React:1.0, Distributed storage systems:0.0, Cloud-native backend systems:0.5
must_have_quals: 3+ years experience in software engineering, primarily focused on cloud-native backend systems, B.Sc / M.Sc in Computer Science or similar field, or equivalent practical experience, Proficient in a modern compiled programming language (Go, Java, C#, C++, etc.), Experience implementing, and operating distributed storage systems with high availability and durability guarantees, Enjoys working with others towards a common goal, You're a self-starter! You're comfortable organizing your own time and propose changes backed by data, Is curious, collaborative, empathetic, coachable and intellectually honest, Great diagnostics skills, considering edge cases in designs with a bias for simplicity, Has a passion for problem solving and learning new things in the domains of computer science and software engineering
preferred_quals: Experience building and testing full-stack systems (using React or similar frameworks), Oncall experience and having customer first approach when considering different approaches, Experience designing Data Lake protocols (and similar e.g. Delta Lake, Hudi,...), Experience optimizing throughput in distributed storage systems, Experience working with multiple cloud providers (AWS, GCP, Azure)
core_responsibilities: Design, architect, build, and deliver core pieces of Atlas with focus on storage systems, query engine, and customer facing components with coding in Go, Java, and React, Approach problems from a customer-focused perspective and use data to propose high ROI improvements to our product and operations, Collaborate with colleagues and other teams in Atlas to scope, spec and deliver new features, Define your top priorities and focuses, communicate them, and execute against them, Improve and maintain our codebase by applying best practices and fundamental software design principles
job_summary: MongoDB is a leading technology company that empowers customers to innovate with its unified database platform. The role of Software Engineer 3 involves designing, building, and testing high-impact projects to enhance the Atlas Data Federation system's scalability and performance, while collaborating with teams to deliver new features.
